failedAssertions.reason: From /demo/create-keyset, first click on Create Keyset goes to /create instead of /create/progress.
Full create flow from /demo/create-keyset requires an extra click through /create before /create/progress.
Continue to Distribute Shares from /demo/shared-create-profile routes to /create instead of /create/distribute.
Share #3 disabled Copy/QR controls render at computed opacity 0.45 instead of expected 0.4.
Finish Distribution from /demo/shared-distribution-completion navigates to / instead of /dashboard/{profileId}.
